extraction.one_line_summary: HARADA Yoshihiko won from breakaway after TEUNS Dylan towed him to leaders with 20km remaining, TEUNS taking red jersey by finishing second
tactical_patterns: TEUNS attacked when CRUZ showed weakness on final climb, bridged 40-second gap solo while carrying passenger HARADA to stage win.
POGACAR at age 20 launched solo attack from GC group on summit finish, gaining seconds despite no tactical need as white jersey wearer.
Breakaway formation delayed 50+ kilometers due to peloton aggression, suggesting GC teams uncertain about stage control strategy after Lopez takeover.

rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: Sacrificed stage win to take red jersey, showing ability to bridge 40-second gaps solo on summit finishes
rider_signals.HARADA Yoshihiko: positive: Smart wheelsucking allowed fresh sprint after TEUNS did bridging work, first Grand Tour win signals breakaway threat
rider_signals.CRUZ David de la: negative: Showed weakness on final climb despite being virtual race leader, cracked when TEUNS attacked with 20km remaining
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Unprompted attack from GC group at age 20 gained time on rivals including fourth-place GC rider, exceptional aggression for domestique role
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Nelson: negative: Bridged to GAMAY but couldn't hold pace when TEUNS counter-attacked, suggesting one-move limitation in breakaways
